'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 65''' was the sixty-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 26]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]
*[[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]]
*[[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Lianorm Swamp/Legends|Swamp]]
*[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|Trade Federation Battle Droid]]
*[[Homing beacon/Legends|Homing Beacons]]
*[[Tydirium/Legends|Imperial Shuttle Tydirium]]
*[[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Trade Federation Droid Control Ship]]
